security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://api.openai.com https://api.x.ai http://localhost:11434 http://127.0.0.1:11434 http://localhost:1234 http://127.0.0.1:1234 http://localhost:8000 http://127.0.0.1:8000 https://openrouter.ai https://api.openrouter.ai https://api.groq.com wss://y-webrtc-signaling.fly.dev wss://signaling.yjs.dev; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self'; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none';

bundle.shortDescription: AI-powered creative writing and world-building application
bundle.longDescription: WorldScript Studio is an offline-first, AI-powered creative writing application with local LLM inference, plot boards, character management, and manuscript export.
